name: aliceloop
description: Desktop-first AI runtime and study companion for TCM learners.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @aliceloop/runtime-core && npm run build --workspace @aliceloop/pdf-ingest && npm run build --workspace @aliceloop/daemon && npm run build --workspace @aliceloop/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @aliceloop/runtime-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @aliceloop/pdf-ingest && npm run typecheck --workspace @aliceloop/daemon && npm run typecheck --workspace @aliceloop/desktop
